name: Carrier Global Corporation
name_former: United Technologies Corporation (HVAC, Refrigeration, and Fire & Security divisions)
description: Carrier Global Corporation is a leading global provider of healthy, safe, sustainable and intelligent building and cold chain solutions. Founded by the inventor of modern air conditioning, Carrier is a world leader in heating, air-conditioning and refrigeration solutions. The company operates through three main segments: Heating, Ventilating, and Air Conditioning (HVAC), Refrigeration, and Fire & Security, serving customers in residential, commercial, industrial, food service, and transportation applications worldwide.
